languages.text: "Бог-Император, бесконечный в своей милости, прикоснись к моему сыну любящими руками, ибо верую, что твоя воля — дабы стал он здоров разумом, телом и духом..."

traits.locale_text: "Бог-Император, бесконечный в своей милости, прикоснись к моему сыну любящими руками, ибо верую, что твоя воля — дабы стал он здоров разумом, телом и духом..."

languages.text: "God-Emperor, infinite in Your mercy, touch my son with loving hands, for I believe it is Your will that he become healthy in mind, body, and spirit..."
languages.original_text: "Бог-Император, бесконечный в своей милости, прикоснись к моему сыну любящими руками, ибо верую, что твоя воля — дабы стал он здоров разумом, телом и духом..."

traits.locale_text: "God-Emperor, infinite in Your mercy, touch my son with loving hands, for I believe it is Your will that he become healthy in mind, body, and spirit..."
"God-Emperor, infinite in Your mercy, touch my son with loving hands, for I believe it is Your will that he become healthy in mind, body, and spirit..."
"God-Emperor, infinite in Your mercy, touch my son with loving hands, for I believe it is Your will that he become healthy in mind, body, and spirit..."

languages.text: 「慈悲に満ちた神皇帝よ、我が子を愛に満ちた手で触れてください。我が子が心身ともに健康になるのは、あなたの御意であると信じます…」
languages.original_text: "God-Emperor, infinite in Your mercy, touch my son with loving hands, for I believe it is Your will that he become healthy in mind, body, and spirit..."

languages.text: "Merhameti sonsuz Tanrı İmparator, sevgi dolu ellerinizle oğluma dokunun. Onun akıl, beden ve ruh sağlığına kavuşmasının iradeniz olduğuna inanıyorum..."
languages.original_text: "God-Emperor, infinite in Your mercy, touch my son with loving hands, for I believe it is Your will that he become healthy in mind, body, and spirit..."

traits.locale_text: "Merhameti sonsuz Tanrı İmparator, sevgi dolu ellerinizle oğluma dokunun. Onun akıl, beden ve ruh sağlığına kavuşmasının iradeniz olduğuna inanıyorum..."

languages.text: “神皇啊，您慈悲无量，请以慈爱之手抚触我儿，我深信您的意志必使他身心康健、灵性清明……”
languages.original_text: "God-Emperor, infinite in Your mercy, touch my son with loving hands, for I believe it is Your will that he become healthy in mind, body, and spirit..."

traits.locale_text: “神皇啊，您慈悲无量，请以慈爱之手抚触我儿，我深信您的意志必使他身心康健、灵性清明……”

languages.text: "Gnädiger Gottimperator, berühre meinen Sohn mit liebenden Händen, denn ich glaube, es ist Dein Wille, dass sein Verstand, Körper und Geist gesundet ..."
languages.original_text: "God-Emperor, infinite in Your mercy, touch my son with loving hands, for I believe it is Your will that he become healthy in mind, body, and spirit..."

traits.locale_text: "Gnädiger Gottimperator, berühre meinen Sohn mit liebenden Händen, denn ich glaube, es ist Dein Wille, dass sein Verstand, Körper und Geist gesundet ..."

languages.text: « Empereur-Dieu, dans Votre infinie miséricorde, effleurez mon fils de Vos mains aimantes, car telle est, je crois, Votre volonté, qu'il redevienne sain de corps et d'esprit… »
languages.original_text: "God-Emperor, infinite in Your mercy, touch my son with loving hands, for I believe it is Your will that he become healthy in mind, body, and spirit..."

traits.locale_text: « Empereur-Dieu, dans Votre infinie miséricorde, effleurez mon fils de Vos mains aimantes, car telle est, je crois, Votre volonté, qu'il redevienne sain de corps et d'esprit… »

languages.text: «Dios Emperador, en tu infinita misericordia, cuida de mi hijo, pues creo firmemente que es Tu voluntad que recupere la salud en cuerpo, mente y alma...».
languages.original_text: "God-Emperor, infinite in Your mercy, touch my son with loving hands, for I believe it is Your will that he become healthy in mind, body, and spirit..."

traits.locale_text: «Dios Emperador, en tu infinita misericordia, cuida de mi hijo, pues creo firmemente que es Tu voluntad que recupere la salud en cuerpo, mente y alma...».
